(Cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψίζομαι</foreign> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔψιδεν</foreign> Id.) <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψίνθος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέρψις,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψινύθιον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φαῦλον,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
